overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a stormy coastal landscape with ancient shipwreck ruins, transitioning into a dense forest trail. The scene features heavy rain, dark atmospheric lighting, and natural wilderness terrain with consistent forward exploration.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along weathered stone ruins toward a massive wooden shipwreck structure on the coastline

entered.detail: massive wooden viking-style shipwreck with broken mast tilted on the shore
weathered stone paving blocks forming a raised walkway
dark stormy sea visible beyond the shipwreck
tree-covered hills rising in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along ancient stone ruins on a stormy coast, approaching a massive wooden shipwreck structure. The path is paved with weathered stones and the dark sea is visible to the left while forested hills rise on the right.

events.description: ground surface changes from stone ruins to dirt and grass path
large shipwreck structure passes out of view behind the character

agents.ego_description: continuing along the coastal path as the terrain becomes more natural with grass and scattered rocks

entered.detail: grassy hillside replacing the stone ruins
rocky outcrops and boulders on the right slope
individual pine trees dotting the distant landscape

segments.scene_description: The stone ruins give way to a dirt trail through grassy coastal hills. The shipwreck disappears behind as the character moves inland, with scattered trees and rocky outcrops beginning to appear on the horizon.

events.description: entering dense forest area with tall pine trees surrounding the path

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow forest trail surrounded by dense trees and rocky outcrops on both sides

entered.detail: tall pine trees forming a dense wall on the left side of the trail
large moss-covered boulders and rock formations lining the path
thick tree canopy partially obscuring the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The trail enters a dense pine forest with rocky terrain lining both sides of the path. The sky becomes partially obscured by the thick tree canopy while the character continues walking through the stormy woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a stormy, ruin-strewn coastline into the depths of a dense pine forest. It begins along weathered stone ruins beside a dark sea, moving toward the imposing silhouette of a massive wooden shipwreck. As the camera pushes inland, the stone path gives way to a dirt trail through grassy coastal hills, leaving the shipwreck behind as rocky outcrops and scattered trees emerge on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the trail enters a thick woodland, where the open coastal sky is gradually obscured by a heavy canopy of pine trees. Finally, the environment settles into a stormy forest landscape with rocky terrain lining both sides of the path.
